163.reason: [Error: When EOF is reached after a single '&', lineInd hasn't been updated to reflect the line of the '&', because nextChar() was never called to process the '&'. Also, it incorrectly adds an AND token despite the error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: When EOF is reached after a single '&', lineInd hasn't been updated to reflect the line of the '&', because nextChar() was never called to process the '&'. Also, it incorrectly adds an AND token despite the error.]

164.reason: [Error: Should not generate a token when a lexical error occurs; only error output should be produced.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: Should not generate a token when a lexical error occurs; only error output should be produced.]

168.reason: [Error: The line number printed is the current lineInd, which corresponds to the line *after* the newline if curChar is '\n', but more critically, the single '&' is on the previous character position. Since nextChar() advanced pt and possibly incremented lineInd if the next char was '\n', lineInd may be incorrect. However, the main issue is that it still adds a token even when an error is detected.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: The line number printed is the current lineInd, which corresponds to the line *after* the newline if curChar is '\n', but more critically, the single '&' is on the previous character position. Since nextChar() advanced pt and possibly incremented lineInd if the next char was '\n', lineInd may be incorrect. However, the main issue is that it still adds a token even when an error is detected.]

169.reason: [Error: Incorrectly adds a valid token for an invalid input. According to spec, only error should be output for erroneous programs.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.125 , reason:  [Error: Incorrectly adds a valid token for an invalid input. According to spec, only error should be output for erroneous programs.]
